instructions: GIT: Before git op (commit/push/branch/PR): read BACKLOG.md, CHANGELOG.md, VERSION. New dir tree? `git check-ignore <path>` — confirm tracked, not exposed. Every commit: `git diff --cached` scan for (API|SECRET|KEY|TOKEN|PASSWORD|PASSWD|CREDENTIALS|sk-[a-zA-Z0-9]). Found? Don't commit — replace placeholder. No secrets/personal data in public repo. .opencode/ config = own commit, separate from content. No rebase — merge. Before PR: fetch origin, merge origin/main into branch. Full: .omo/rules/commit-conventions.md.

CODE: AI output = untrusted. Before commit >1 expression: check for (1) eval(), innerHTML concat, CSP disable; (2) hallucinated APIs, missing functions; (3) hardcoded creds. >10 lines or behavioral change? RCI-loop (self-review → improve). AI-suggested package? Verify on official registry — real publisher, check history. Cross-check name — AI hallucinates slopsquatting targets. Pin exact version + integrity hash. Follow .specs/security/README.md. Developer owns all committed code.

WORK: Before edit production file: verify (1) task in BACKLOG.md "In Progress", (2) branch name matches task, (3) branch not main/master — use feature branch. No backlog match? Don't start — ask user. Wrong branch? Switch or create. No todos during planning/research/discussion/waiting — only after user confirms start.
COMPLETION: Task done? Re-read BACKLOG.md + CHANGELOG.md — confirm tracking updated.

DESIGN: Before coding: read .design/ + .specs/. New feature/tech? review .specs/security/README.md + .omo/rules/security-web.md — expand rules for new attack surface. URL rename/remove/create? update .design/information-architecture.md. Don't modify .design/ or .specs/ without user confirmation. Full: .omo/rules/spec-discipline.md.

GITHUB: GitHub Issues/Projects: scope to noexcuse-no/www-public only. No read/write outside it. Ask before write (create/update/close/comment/reassign/project fields). Default: read-only. Full: .omo/rules/github-issues-projects.md.
